overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition showing protagonist CJ running along a wooden waterfront pier at sunset. The character moves steadily past other pedestrians while festive banners and street trees line the boardwalk overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront pier with festive decorations

agents.ego_description: CJ is running steadily along the wooden pier, moving past other pedestrians while maintaining a straight path along the boardwalk

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt and dark pants walking toward the camera along the pier
woman in yellow dress walking toward the camera on the right side of the pier

entered.detail: wide wooden plank boardwalk forming the walking surface of the pier
strings of triangular pennant flags suspended overhead along the length of the pier
mature deciduous trees planted in intervals along the left side of the pier
mature deciduous trees planted in intervals along the right side of the pier
calm blue ocean water visible beyond the right edge of the pier
wooden benches placed along the right side of the pier facing the water
green forested hills visible in the distance across the water on the left
tall modern street lamps positioned along the left side of the pier

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous movement along a wooden waterfront pier during golden hour. CJ runs forward along the plank boardwalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The pier is lined with trees and festive banner garlands overhead, with calm ocean waters visible to the right and distant green hills on the left. Wooden benches face the water, and the warm sunset lighting casts a yellow-orange glow across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden waterfront pier bathed in the warm, shifting light of the golden hour. It begins with the protagonist running forward along the plank boardwalk, weaving past pedestrians moving in the opposite direction. As the camera advances, the view expands to reveal festive banner garlands and trees lining the path, while wooden benches face the calm ocean waters to the right. The scene then shifts toward the horizon, where the yellow-orange glow of the sunset illuminates distant green hills on the left before the movement continues steadily along the coast.
